messages.content: Set into tv show The Arrow universe. Sarah lance and Nysa Al ghul are in a relationship. Both find themselves interested in new member Al Mansi (previously known as Nicolas before joining the ranks). He is a shy, young man. His dedication to training is second to none and he is making progress faster than anyone before him. He is also Someone who should easily be forgotten. His unassuming nature make him someone nobody really would think as an assassin. Story start with Al Mansi in the training halls. He as progressed by leaps and bound and is on part with both Sarab and Nyssa in hand to hand combat with a style leaning more on hard style. He is now Working on his bo staff. Both Nyssa and Sarah propose to help him. Nyssa proposes to start training in long range weapons like the bow and arrow. Training session. Written like fiction book.No declaration of romantic interest between Nyssa, Sarah & Al Mansi.

Al Mansi stood in the training hall, sweat dripping down his forehead, and his bo staff in his hand. His movements were calculated and precise, his strikes hitting the wooden targets with force. He had come a long way since he first stepped into the League of Assassins compound.

Nyssa Al Ghul and Sarah Lance watched him from the sidelines. They were both impressed with his skills and dedication to his training.

"Perhaps we should offer him some help," Sarah suggested to Nyssa.

Nyssa nodded in agreement. "I think it's a good idea. I can teach him long-range weapons like the bow and arrow."

Sarah smiled. "And I can help him with his hand-to-hand combat."

They approached Al Mansi, who looked up from his training to greet them.

"Al Mansi, we've been watching your progress, and we think we can help you improve even further," Nyssa said.

Al Mansi's eyes widened in surprise. "Really? I would be honored to receive your guidance."

Nyssa smiled at him. "Good. Let's start with the bow and arrow."

They moved to the archery range, where Nyssa taught Al Mansi the basics of shooting. She was impressed by how quickly he picked it up.

"You have a natural talent for this," Nyssa said. "With more practice, you could become an excellent archer."

Next, Sarah worked with Al Mansi on his hand-to-hand combat. She was equally impressed with his hard-hitting style and quick reflexes.

"You have the potential to be one of the best fighters in the league," Sarah said.

Al Mansi thanked them both for their help, feeling grateful for their support and encouragement. He continued to train hard, driven by a passion for his craft that burned within him.

As the weeks passed, Sarah and Nyssa noticed that they were both becoming increasingly drawn to Al Mansi. They admired his dedication and his unwavering focus on his training. They both felt a growing attraction to him, but neither knew how to express it.

Al Mansi remained focused on his training, unaware of the feelings that Sarah and Nyssa harbored for him. He continued to work hard, determined to become the best assassin he could be.

The training sessions with Sarah and Nyssa were intense and challenging, but Al Mansi relished every moment of it. He was grateful for their guidance and knew that he was making steady progress towards his goals.

As they trained, the three assassins built a bond, one fueled by their shared love of their craft. None of them knew what the future held, but they were all content to focus on the present and the lessons that their training could teach them.

Month passed and they became a team. As time passes, their team became the stuff of legends even by league standards. Gaining the notice of Ras AlGhul who, with his more than keen eyes, realized that the three were dancing around each other. Yet their combined skills couldn’t be ignored. So he remained silent on the matter. As long as those three knews that their loyalty to the league was most important, he would allow it. No love declaration between Nyssa, Sarah & Al Mansi.

Their team became the most respected and feared within the League of Assassins. Nyssa, Sarah, and Al Mansi continued to train and work together, pushing each other to new heights of skill and focus.

As they grew stronger, Ras Al Ghul noticed that the three seemed to be dancing around each other, their mutual attraction to each other unspoken. But Ras knew that their loyalty to the League was their top priority, and as long as they remained committed to the cause, he was content to let things be.

The team's reputation grew, and they became assigned to the league's most challenging missions. They worked together seamlessly, their different skills and specialties overlapping and complementing each other.

Sarah, Nyssa, and Al Mansi grew increasingly close, but they all knew that they couldn't let their feelings interfere with their work. The safety of the league and its mission was their primary concern, and they put their hearts and minds into their training and their missions.

As the months passed, their bond grew stronger, and their skills continued to sharpen. They became the stuff of legends within the League, feared and respected by all who knew of them. Yet, they remained humble and focused, always putting the League's mission first.

But as much as they tried to ignore it, their attraction to each other continued to grow. They knew that they couldn't act on it, but there were times when their glances lingered a little longer, and their touches were a little more meaningful.

Nevertheless, they remained committed to their work. The safety of the League was their top priority, and nothing would come between them and their mission.

As years passed, Al Mansi presence helped Sarah not lost herself in the killing. And when news of the undertakings, of the Glades of Starling City reach them, he offered support. « Maybe I could go there in your place. Make sure your loved one there are self and learn how it was possible that someone such as Al Saher could betray us without anyone noticing. It could be useful in the futur too. Nysa what do you think your father will say about it ? ». In the end, Ras Al Ghul agreed for Al Mansi to go. But without Sarah nor Nyssa. Sarah was too much emotionally involved & Nyssa needed to be there for the time being. Al Mansi mission was to learn how Malcom Merlyn could have done that without being notice by the league, who was the warrior who had managed to defeat him & learn more of this man. On a more personal note, he would make sure that Sarah family was still there.

Al Mansi traveled to Starling City, disguised as a technician. He knew that it would be a challenging mission, but he was determined to learn as much as he could.

As he arrived in the city, he felt a strange sense of familiarity. He had heard stories of Starling City from Sarah and Nyssa, and he had seen glimpses of it on news broadcasts.

Al Mansi started his mission immediately, investigating the events that had led to the Undertaking and the betrayal by Al Saher. He was careful to avoid raising suspicion as he gathered information, using his training and wiry frame to blend in seamlessly with the city's technicians and construction workers.

He also made it his mission to check in on Sarah's family, making sure that they were safe and well. He knew how important they were to her, and he felt a sense of duty to protect them while she was away.

One day, while investigating a construction site, Al Mansi came across a man who was clearly trained in hand-to-hand combat. He watched as the man single-handedly took down a group of workers who had attacked him.

Intrigued, Al Mansi approached the man, introducing himself as a fellow technician. The man, who introduced himself as Oliver Queen, seemed friendly enough, but Al Mansi sensed something off about him.

Over the next few days, Al Mansi kept a close eye on Oliver Queen, following him as he went about his business. Slowly but surely, Al Mansi began to piece together the puzzle of how Malcolm Merlyn had managed to betray the League without being detected.

Al Mansi also began to learn more about Oliver Queen and the secrets that he was hiding. He was conflicted - he knew that he had to report his findings to the League, but he couldn't help but feel a sense of respect for Queen and his mission. He wondered if there was more to Queen than met the eye.

As his mission in Starling City drew to a close, Al Mansi reflected on all that he had learned. He had grown as an assassin and as a person, and he knew that his experiences would stay with him forever.

He made his way back to the League, eager to report his findings and to see his teammates once again. But he couldn't shake the feeling that there was more to the story of Malcolm Merlyn and Oliver Queen than he had uncovered.

With both Nyssa & Sarah presents, Al Mansi made his report on the situation. His belief that there was more infolding in the city, that something dangerous was making its way to Starling City. He also reported his findings about Oliver Queen, his clumsy (by league standards) skills & how he believed that either Oliver Queen had been lucky or ready to die to defeat his opponent. If his insctincts were rights, Oliver Queen, The Arrow, may not be in a position to protect his city from what lay ahead.

Nyssa and Sarah listened intently as Al Mansi made his report. They both trusted his instincts, and they knew that he wouldn't raise alarm unless there was a real threat. They also knew that Al Mansi's training and observations were second to none.

As Al Mansi finished his report, Nyssa spoke up. "I too have heard rumors of danger in Starling City. It seems that Malcolm Merlyn may not have acted alone in his betrayal of the League. There are whispers of a possible new organization, one that is more ruthless and dangerous than anything we've ever faced before."

Sarah nodded in agreement. "And we know that Oliver Queen, The Arrow, is the city's protector. If what you're saying is true, then he may need our help."

Al Mansi nodded. "I believe that we should investigate this organization further. We need to find out who they are and what their true intentions are. And we need to do it quickly, before they can cause any more harm."

Nyssa and Sarah both agreed with Al Mansi, knowing that his tactical mind and keen intuition would be invaluable in a situation like this. They made a plan to return to Starling City and investigate the organization further.

As they prepared for their mission, they felt a sense of uncertainty and danger looming over them. But they knew that they had a duty to protect the league and the innocent people of Starling City.

Together, Sarah, Nyssa, and Al Mansi would face whatever came their way, no matter the cost. They were a team, bound by their loyalty and their fierce dedication to their craft, and they would do whatever it took to protect the people they loved and the League that they served.
The team made their return to Starling City, just in time to hear about the stealing of a centrifuge from Queen Consolidated.

The team knew that time was of the essence. They quickly went to work, utilizing their skills and resources to track down the stolen centrifuge and get to the bottom of who was behind its theft.

Al Mansi used his tech skills to hack into various systems and gather information, while Nyssa and Sarah used their combat training to track down any leads and take down any threats that crossed their path.

As they worked, they started to uncover clues that pointed to a new organization that was operating within the city. They realized that their suspicions had been right - something dangerous was happening in Starling City, and it was bigger than just Malcolm Merlyn's betrayal of the League.

The team pushed themselves harder than ever before, determined to protect the city and its people no matter the cost. They tracked down members of the new organization, gathering information and striking fear into those who stood in their way.

And all the while, they remained vigilant, knowing that danger could strike at any moment. They were ready for whatever came their way, and they would protect the League and Starling City at all costs.

Finally, after weeks of investigation and hard work, the team discovered the true identity and intentions of the new organization that had been lurking in Starling City. They realized that they were facing an enemy unlike any they had ever faced before - an enemy that threatened not just the city, but also the very existence of the League of Assassins.

With this knowledge, the team knew that they would have to make a difficult decision - one that would test their loyalties, their skills, and their bonds as a team. But they were ready for whatever lay ahead, knowing that they had each other to rely on.

Together, they stood firm, united in their mission and in their commitment to protect the League and the people of Starling City at all costs.
The team decide to help The Hood when a bomber, Mark Sheffer, make himself known again.

As the team continued to investigate the new organization in Starling City, they received a call from The Hood. He informed them of a new threat that was looming over the city - a man known as Mark Sheffer, who was responsible for a string of bombings.

The team knew that they had to act fast. They decided to team up with The Hood to take down Sheffer and put an end to his terror once and for all.

Nyssa and Sarah took to the streets, with Al Mansi working behind the scenes to gather information and locate Sheffer's whereabouts. They tracked him down to an abandoned building, where they found him preparing a bomb for his next target.

The team sprang into action, taking out Sheffer's henchmen with ease. But when it came to taking down Sheffer himself, they found themselves facing a formidable opponent. Sheffer was quick and agile, with a seemingly endless supply of bombs at his disposal.

As the fight raged on, Sarah and Nyssa coordinated their attacks, working together to corner Sheffer and take him down. Al Mansi used his tech skills to disarm the bombs and hack into Sheffer's communication systems, which gave them the upper hand in the fight.

After a grueling battle, the team emerged victorious. Sheffer was defeated, and his reign of terror was put to an end. The people of Starling City could rest easy once more.

As they emerged from the building, The Hood thanked the team for their help. "You guys really know how to handle yourselves," he said. "I might have to call on you again in the future."

The team knew that, no matter what the future held, they could count on each other to have their backs. They were a force to be reckoned with, united in their mission and their fierce dedication to protecting the League and the people they served.
"We'd rather you learn to take care of your city yourself. But for now Starling City is in ours hands." Al Mansi bluntly told The Hood.

The Hood nodded in agreement. "I understand what you're saying. But there are still dangers lurking in this city, and I can't fight them alone."

Nyssa chimed in. "You don't have to fight them alone. The League is here to help you. We want to ensure that your city remains safe and secure."

Sarah added, "We've seen what you're capable of, and we know that you're a powerful ally. But we need to work together if we're going to protect the city and the League."

The Hood nodded once again, recognizing the strength and skill of the team before him. He knew that he could rely on them to be there when he needed them.

"Thank you," he said. "I'll be in touch if there's anything else that comes up."

The team nodded, knowing that they had made a valuable ally in The Hood. As they prepared to leave Starling City, they knew that their work was never truly done. But they were ready for whatever challenges lay ahead, knowing that they had each other to rely on. Together, they would protect the League and the people they served, no matter what challenges or dangers they faced.
Al Mansi was the one task by Ras Al Ghul to remain in Starling City. It was, in itself, putting this city into his custody. The Hood was, for now, a footnote into Al Mansi investigation.

Al Mansi accepted Ras Al Ghul's order to remain in Starling City. He knew that it was a great responsibility, but he was prepared for the challenges that lay ahead.

As he delved deeper into his investigation of the new organization in the city, he kept a close eye on The Hood. He knew that The Hood was an ally for now, but he couldn't discount the possibility of him becoming a threat in the future.

Al Mansi continued to gather information and lay the groundwork for his investigation, all while coordinating with Sarah and Nyssa from afar. Though he had a tough exterior and a sharp mind, he knew that he couldn't do it alone. He relied on the support and expertise of his teammates to help him navigate the complex web of crime and corruption that was gripping the city.

And slowly but surely, his efforts began to bear fruit. He uncovered more information about the new organization and their plans, and he worked tirelessly to disrupt their operations and take down their leaders.

Though he often faced danger and uncertainty in his work, Al Mansi never lost sight of his mission. He was determined to protect the League and the people of Starling City, no matter what the cost.

Years of work had befell him, and as he stood upon the same roof The Arrow once considered his own he realized he had become a known figure in this city. While he tried to avoid taking life, Al Mansi had a reputation of being ruthless - of casually tossing men he deemed unnecessary off the roof. But on the other hand, he protected the city, its citizen and ensured the powerplay between the different factions in the city remained balanced.

In the end, Al Mansi's tenure in Starling City would become part of the city's lore. For better or for worse, he had left his mark on the city, and his legacy would live on for years to come.
Some time later, Al Mansi witness young Roy Harper using his  mirakuru augmented strenght & intervene to save a policeman. "Stand down boy"

As Al Mansi arrived at the scene, he saw Roy Harper using his Mirakuru-enhanced strength to fend off a group of attackers. He watched closely, analyzing the situation and taking note of the young man's fighting style.

"Stand down, boy." Al Mansi called out to Roy Harper. "You don't need to resort to violence."

Roy Harper, confused and disoriented by the effects of the Mirakuru, looked up at Al Mansi. "Who are you? Why are you here?"

"I am Al Mansi, a member of the League of Assassins," he replied. "And I'm here to help you."

With that, Al Mansi approached
